scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && concurrently -n auth,books,admin,web -c cyan,green,yellow,white "npm run offline --workspace=services/auth" "npm run offline --workspace=services/books" "npm run offline --workspace=services/admin" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/shared && npm run test --workspace=services/books && npm run test --workspace=services/admin && npm run test --workspace=frontend
